summary: A black SUV traveling on the left side of the road suddenly veers sharply towards the right, colliding violently with the curb.

events_timeline.event: The black SUV travels along the road and abruptly veers sharply to the right, crashing into the curb.

uncertainties: The identity of the driver/passenger inside the SUV cannot be determined.
Whether the SUV lost control due to mechanical failure or reckless driving is unclear.

risk_assessment.why: The SUV's sudden and violent deviation from its intended path indicates a loss of control, resulting in a catastrophic crash upon impact with the curb.
